scripts.lint: docker compose run --rm --no-deps app ruff check askdocs tests
scripts.test:integration: docker compose run --rm app pytest -q -m integration
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose run --rm app pytest -q -m e2e
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose run --rm app pytest -q --cov=askdocs --cov-branch --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=json:coverage/pytest-cov.json && node scripts/cov-adapt.mjs
